Flash Contest: Wind Chimes

Article Fixture

This paragraph intentionally has poor contrast for the health scanner.

This readable article body has enough text for reader extraction. It includes a reader details link so focus mode can keep useful links clickable. It includes several sentences so simplify mode, focus mode, and cognitive chunking can be tested with realistic content.

This stubborn same-color paragraph simulates sites that use inline important styles on card text.
